research_question: How do professional creative studios and design agencies design, structure, and build their own homepages to attract premium clients?
mode: Deep Research (8-phase pipeline, multi-level BFS expansion, 270+ sources)
assumptions: Premium studio homepages follow identifiable structural patterns
The shift from visual experimentation to clarity-driven design is a meaningful trend
GSAP + Lenis + ScrollTrigger is the dominant animation stack for studio sites
Platform choice (Webflow/Framer/Next.js/SvelteKit) significantly impacts design possibilities
Hero section patterns can be categorized into distinct archetypes
